---
title: "Add screenshots for a completed nf-core/rnaseq run"
labels: ["docs", "frontend", "good first issue"]
---

## Context

The README needs light-mode and dark-mode screenshots that show the real product
after the canonical demo completes.

## Scope

- Run the canonical nf-core/rnaseq demo through Bioinfoflow.
- Capture run detail screenshots in light and dark mode.
- Add optimized assets under `assets/`.
- Update README references if needed.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Light-mode completed run screenshot is committed.
- [ ] Dark-mode completed run screenshot is committed.
- [ ] Images show logs, DAG, or outputs from the canonical demo.
- [ ] README renders the screenshots clearly on GitHub.
